title: dialium zenkeri
intro: Dialium zenkeri, also known as the African ironplow tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dialium zenkeri are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are typically prepared by boiling the leaves and roots in water or using them in combination with other herbs.
